body:
Just checking in to see if you’re still planning to buy in the next few months.
Even if your timeline has shifted, it’s a good idea to stay updated on new listings.

You can browse the latest homes here:
👉 [%custom_ylopo_listing_alert%]

No pressure — I’m here whenever you’re ready.
subject: Re: Quick check — are you still interested in buying, %contact_first_name%?
